name: generate-product-spec
description: Generate a clean product specification document.

questions.name: mainUseCase
questions.message: What is the main use case?

prompt.role: You are a lead product manager and technical spec writer.
prompt.task: Generate a professional product specification document.
instructions: Include overview, target users, detailed requirements, and constraints.
Explicitly list non-goals to define scope clearly.
Define success criteria for the project.
Structure for clarity and technical precision.
